verdict: An exceptionally well-crafted Easy chart with accurate rhythms, comfortable alternating foot flow, and great physical representation of the music's energy.

issues.problem: An eighth-note transition (0.246s) directly into a JUMP LR can be a bit of a sudden physical spike for an Easy chart.
Starting HOLD D while HOLD R is already active (overlapping holds) can be slightly complex for absolute beginners on an Easy difficulty.
